name: Fantasy Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the braising liquid by combining 5 cups hot water, 1 cup dark soy sauce, 1 cup rice wine or dry sherry, 3 tablespoons roasted Sichuan peppercorns (whole), 6 tablespoons rock or ordinary sugar, 4 star anise, 2 cinnamon sticks or bark, and 2 teaspoons five-spice powder with 1 teaspoon salt.
2. Dry the ham thoroughly with paper towels.
3. Cut the scallions into 3-inch segments.
4. Choose a heavy casserole or pot large enough to hold the ham comfortably.
5. Heat the pot, then add the oil, ginger, garlic, and scallions. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Push the aromatics to one side and brown the ham on each side until it has some color, about 10 to 15 minutes.
7. Pour off the oil.
8. Add all the braising liquid ingredients to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
9. Reduce the heat to a simmer, cover tightly, and cook for about 4 1/2 hours, turning the ham occasionally.
10. When the ham is tender, remove it gently with a large spatula. The meat should be falling apart.
11. Place the ham on a serving platter.
12. Strain the sauce, skim off any surface fat, and reduce the liquid until slightly thick.
13. Pour the sauce over the ham and serve.
